positive.stdout:
% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!
% SZS status Theorem for simple_pos.tptp
% SZS output start Proof for simple_pos.tptp
1. man(michael) [input(axiom)]
2. man(michael) [input(conjecture)]
3. ~man(michael) [negated conjecture 2]
4. ~man(michael) [flattening 3]
5. man(michael) [cnf transformation 1]
6. ~man(michael) [cnf transformation 4]
7. $false [forward subsumption resolution 5,6]
% SZS output end Proof for simple_pos.tptp
% Termination reason: Refutation
